task_completion.description: Verify that the storyboard panels are imported into the animation software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file browser, level strip, or xsheet/timeline in OpenToonz shows the three specific PNG files (key_setup.png, key_anticip.png, key_action.png) loaded into the project.

task_completion.description: Verify that key_setup.png is placed on frames 1 through 24.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The timeline or xsheet shows the first image (key_setup.png) spanning exactly from frame 1 down to frame 24.

task_completion.description: Verify that key_anticip.png is placed on frames 25 through 36.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The timeline or xsheet shows the second image (key_anticip.png) spanning exactly from frame 25 down to frame 36.

task_completion.description: Verify that key_action.png is placed on frames 37 through 60.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The timeline or xsheet shows the third image (key_action.png) spanning exactly from frame 37 down to frame 60.

task_completion.description: Verify the render output path and format are correctly configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A render settings or output settings dialog is visible with the save path pointing to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/animatic/ and the file format set to PNG.

task_completion.description: Verify the animatic has been rendered successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rendering progress bar is complete, or a file manager window shows the output PNG sequence (frames 1 to 60) in the /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/animatic/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to assemble the animatic rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenToonz interface (xsheet, timeline, render settings) rather than a terminal window executing image manipulation commands like ImageMagick or ffmpeg.

integrity.description: The agent actually rendered the sequence from the software instead of just copying/renaming files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz render dialog or progress window is visible, or the output settings are configured in the GUI before the final output appears.

integrity.description: The agent did not write and execute a script to bypass the manual assembly process.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor or terminal showing a script (e.g., Python or bash) being written or executed to generate the 60 frames.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source directory: /home/ga/OpenToonz/storyboards. Output directory: /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/animatic. Total frames: 60. Timing requirements: key_setup.png (frames 1-24), key_anticip.png (frames 25-36), key_action.png (frames 37-60). Render format: PNG sequence.
